name: agent-dashboard
description: Lightweight local agent dashboard with model selector

scripts.test: node tests/safety-layer.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/review-blockers.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/persistence-status.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/tracing-status.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/websocket-events.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/demo-mode.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/metrics-api.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/task-queue.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/webhooks.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/functional-health.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/e2e-chat.js
scripts.test:unit: node tests/safety-layer.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/review-blockers.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/persistence-status.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/tracing-status.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/websocket-events.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/demo-mode.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/metrics-api.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/task-queue.js && node --experimental-vm-modules tests/webhooks.js
scripts.test:coverage: rm -rf .v8-coverage && mkdir -p .v8-coverage && NODE_V8_COVERAGE=.v8-coverage npm run test:unit && c8 report --temp-directory=.v8-coverage --reporter=text --reporter=lcov
